name: 短剑（★） | 狩猎网格
descriptionEn: Historically a focal point of contention and even regulation, this Italian-style stiletto switchblade knife features a spring-loaded blade that can be deployed almost instantly with the push of a release catch. It has been spray-painted using mesh fencing and cardboard cutouts as stencils. A predator is a predator, no matter the environment
descriptionZh: 作为历史上舆论乃至法规的讨论焦点，这把配备着弹簧加压刀刃的意大利短剑可以在按下开关的瞬间弹出到位。 这把武器以围住的网格和纸板切口为漏字板进行了喷漆。 不管环境怎么变，弱肉强食的法则永远不会改变
